messages.subject: ZhaoYang Dong - 새로운 관련 연구
messages.body:
[Collaborative planning of multi-park electricity hydrogen integrated energy systems based on refined categorized demand response: a bi-level stochastic optimization framework](https://example.org/paper1.pdf)

P Ren, Y Dong, H Zhang - Reliability Engineering & System Safety, 2026

This study tackles coordinated planning of multi-park electric hydrogen integrated energy systems.

[Anomaly detection and cyber resilience improvement method for EV charging network against false data injection attacks](https://example.org/paper2)

J Xia, R Deng, M Wang - Sustainable Energy Technologies and Assessments, 2026

The rapid growth of EV charging infrastructure raises cybersecurity concerns.
